If your toe pain is driving you nuts and you can't walk without limping, this video is for you.

Most people don't realize that this kind of pain isn't random. It starts with something happening inside your body: high uric acid levels.

Uric acid is a natural waste product. Your body makes it when it breaks down purines, which are found in certain foods like red meat, shellfish, and alcohol.

Now, normally your kidneys can filter it out, but when there's too much uric acid in your bloodstream, it starts to form sharp crystals.

These are tiny, needle-like structures that settle in your joints, usually in the big toe. And that's why the pain is so unbearable. It's actually these crystals stabbing inside your joints.

And once they're there, your body triggers an immune response, making the swelling and pain even worse.

The tricky part is, even if the flare-ups stop, the uric acid is still there, slowly building up over time. And if you don't do something about it, those crystals keep forming, leading to more flare-ups and more pain and more damage to your joints.

So how can we fix it?

Well, the good news is that certain natural compounds have been used for centuries to help regulate uric acid levels and keep your joints healthy. And some of the most powerful ones come from adaptogenic mushrooms.

Reishi has been studied for its ability to support kidney function, helping your body clear out excess uric acid before it turns into painful crystals. It also helps reduce inflammation so your joints can recover faster.

Portasept supports circulation, making it easier for your body to flush out toxins and keep your joints from stiffening up.

Shiitake is packed with antioxidants that help protect against oxidative stress, a key factor in chronic joint pain and inflammation.

Instead of taking a bunch of different supplements, you can get all of these in Reishi mushroom coffee.

Reishi is packed with six adaptogenic mushrooms designed to support your body's natural detoxification process, lower inflammation, and keep your joints healthy.

The best part is it's 100% organic, sugar-free, and completely natural.

If you don't feel the difference, you can simply send back the empty bag for a full refund.

=====================Smoker's lines, straw lines, stress lines—whatever you call them, there are these small fine lines on our lips that show up on anyone as we age.

They can be caused by constant lip pursing, from using straws or smoking, and even just talking.

It's the number one biggest concern I hear from my clients as a professional makeup artist.

Luckily, I'm always ready with my Holy Grail lip smoothing treatment.

I've talked about the benefits of this lip treatment for years on my own social media, and it's finally time to share it with all of you.

Seriously, I can't post a single video without getting comments like: "What are you using on your lips?" or "Your lips look amazing, I need to try this treatment."

Now the reality is, any woman over 40 can have great skin, but the second the lips start becoming thin and wrinkled, it can age you by 10 years.

By 60, usually your lips start to lose their fullness.

You have more lines around your mouth.

This has helped keep my lips full and got my lines under control.

I've never had lip injections because I don't feel like I need them.

I just think this product can do everything a lip injection can do.

Of course, there's always lip fillers, but with all the upkeep, those can cost thousands of dollars a year and aren't accessible for most people—not to mention all the risks.

That's why I'm so excited to share this treatment with you all today.

It's so easy—anyone can do this themselves at home, and it leaves your lips smooth, plump, and hydrated.

And it uses ingredients like hyaluronic acid that support healthy lips so that they look even better with long-term use.

But take it from someone who's used this treatment for years and has recommended it to all my friends, followers, and clients:

You will not be able to live without it once you try.

So click that link below and get yourself the best lips of your life.
